items.title: The administrator of the meme Telegram channel “Free Laplandia” has been sentenced to 15 years in prison.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ukrainian drones target St Petersburg in attack Russia calls 'unprecedented'
items.dek: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.
items.body: The city's governor urges residents to remain indoors for the first time since the beginning of the war.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Lebanon says three soldiers killed in Israeli attack on car
items.dek: The Israeli military is investigating the incident in south Lebanon, where it is fighting Hezbollah.
items.body: The Israeli military is investigating the incident in south Lebanon, where it is fighting Hezbollah.
